context.goal: Select the single letter 'a' in the title text so a text-formatting action can be applied.
context.cues: A document page is open in TIAEditor with the title text 'aketing Basics' centered on the page; the editor is in select text mode and the cursor is near the first visible letter of the title.

state_anchor.locator: bottom status text: Select text mode

anchors.locator: the first visible letter 'a' in the title text 'aketing Basics'

procedure.expect: The letter 'a' is selected and shown with a pink selection highlight.
